welcome_text:
Xush kelibsiz!

Quyida  [T] Tools  tugmasini bosing.
no_tools:
Hech qanday tool topilmadi.

tools/ papkasiga tool qo'shing.

Zetso IQ va Shinobi Roots kabi loyihalar yaratuvchisi.
brain_readme_text:
OHUN Tool Launcher v0.9

Android uchun engil, plugin-asosli tool launcher.
Asosiy ilova hech narsa bilmaydi вЂ” faqat ochadi.
Har bir tool to'liq mustaqil.

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
Qanday ishlaydi:

1. Ilova tools/ papkasini skanerlaydi
2. Har tool main.py + meta.json ga ega
3. Tool open_ui() orqali ochiladi
4. Tool launcher bilan faqat tool_api.py orqali gaplashadi
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
Imkoniyatlar:

в†’ Tool Store   вЂ” GitHub dan tool o'rnatish
в†’ Theme Store  вЂ” ko'rinishni o'zgartirish
в†’ Lang Store   вЂ” tilni o'zgartirish
в†’ Brain        вЂ” hozir o'qiyapsiz
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
Texnologiyalar:

Python + Kivy
Pydroid 3 (Android)
GitHub API
Buildozer (v1.0 da keladi)
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
Versiyalar:

v0.1 вЂ” Asosiy GUI, plugin tizimi
v0.2 вЂ” OutputScreen, open_ui()
v0.3 вЂ” NavBar, Settings
v0.4 вЂ” tool_api.py
v0.5 вЂ” Tool Store
v0.6 вЂ” Tema tizimi
v0.7 вЂ” Til tizimi
v0.8 вЂ” Tema + Til Store
v0.9 вЂ” Qidiruv, yangilash, o'chirish, meta.json
v1.0 вЂ” .apk Buildozer (tez kunda)
brain_devguide_text:
OHUN Launcher uchun tool yasash

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
1. PAPKA STRUKTURASI:

tools/
в””в”Ђв”Ђ your_tool/
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ main.py
    в””в”Ђв”Ђ meta.json
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
2. META.JSON:

{
  "name": "Tool nomi",
  "icon": ">>",
  "color": "#2277ff",
  "version": "1.0",
  "author": "Ismingiz",
  "description": "Nima qiladi"
}
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
3. MAIN.PY (minimal):

from kivy.uix.popup import Popup
from kivy.uix.label import Label

def open_ui():
    lbl = Label(text="Salom tool dan!")
    p = Popup(title="Mening Toolim", content=lbl,
              size_hint=(0.9, 0.5))
    p.open()
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
4. TOOL API:

from tool_api import (
    get_tool_dir,
    save_tool_data,
    load_tool_data,
    notify
)

get_tool_dir(__file__)
в†’ tool papkasi yo'li

save_tool_data(__file__, 'data.json', {})
load_tool_data(__file__, 'data.json', default={})
в†’ ma'lumot saqlash va yuklash

notify("Tayyor!")
в†’ status bar da xabar ko'rsatish
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
5. QOIDALAR:

в†’ Har doim open_ui() ni entry point qiling
в†’ Barcha xatolarni tool ichida ushlab qoling
в†’ Launcherni hech qachon crash qilmang
в†’ Toolni o'z papkasida saqlang
в†’ Launcher bilan faqat tool_api.py orqali gaplashing
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
6. TOOL MANAGER (shart):

from utils import tool_manager

TOOL_NAME = "Tool Nomi"

def open_ui():
    if tool_manager.is_active(TOOL_NAME):
        tool_manager.focus(TOOL_NAME)
        return
    content = YourUI()
    popup = Popup(...)
    content._popup = popup
    tool_manager.register(TOOL_NAME, content, popup)
    popup.open()
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
7. MINIMIZE / YOPISH:

def _minimize(self, *args):
    if hasattr(self, '_popup'):
        self._popup.dismiss()

def _close(self, *args):
    tool_manager.close(TOOL_NAME)
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
8. TAKRORIY BOSISH PROTECTION:

def _start(self, *args):
    if getattr(self, '_searching', False):
        return
    self._searching = True
    ...

def _done(self):
    self._searching = False
    ...
